TextView.android:text: No safety logs yet.\nRecord incidents to build your timeline.
No location data.\nStart journey tracking to see locations.
Auto-trigger safety features based on device sensors
Shake phone vigorously to trigger Fake Call
Uses AI to detect screams and trigger SOS
Configure how SOS alerts are sent
Cancel accidental SOS with your secret safe word
Speak your word to cancel SOS

com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.android:hint: Your Secret Safe Word (to cancel SOS)

TextView.android:text: Say this word during a fake call to secretly trigger SOS
Options for when journey tracking is active
Mark areas where SOS becomes HIGH-RISK priority
Tap the big red button to send emergency SMS with your live location to saved contacts.
Simulates an incoming call so you can excuse yourself from uncomfortable situations.
Share your live location with trusted contacts during late-night travels.
Shake your phone vigorously to trigger a fake call without touching the screen.
